name: build_workflow
description: Constructs a node graph execution workflow.

type.description: The EXACT class type of the node.

mode.description: Default: Keep. Must be one of the listed options.

iterate_mode.description: Default: Files. Must be one of the listed options.

thresh_state.description: Default: [128.0, 1] [threshold, direction] — 1=keep pixels > threshold (strictly above), 0=keep pixels <= threshold (below or equal)

auto_otsu_per_image.description: Default: True set to false when using an explicit thresh_state value; default true overrides manual threshold

target_depth.description: Default: 8. Must be one of the listed options.

plot_type.description: Default: Scatter. Must be one of the listed options.

stain_matrix.description: Default: SK H&E. Must be one of the listed options.

third_stain_mode.description: Default: Ruifrok. Must be one of the listed options.

mode.description: Default: All contours. Must be one of the listed options.

operation.description: Default: A + B. Must be one of the listed options.

axis.description: Default: horizontal. Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: Luminosity (Rec.601). Must be one of the listed options.

resample.description: Default: lanczos. Must be one of the listed options.

position.description: Default: bottom-right. Must be one of the listed options.

show_label.description: Default: True. Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: zhang. Must be one of the listed options.

input_type.description: Default: Raw Data (two columns). Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: One-Way ANOVA. Must be one of the listed options.

model.description: Default: 4PL (EC50 / Dose-Response). Must be one of the listed options.

test.description: Default: All (Shapiro-Wilk + KS + Anderson-Darling). Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: ROUT (Prism Regression). Must be one of the listed options.
Default: Student's T-test. Must be one of the listed options.

alternative.description: Default: two-sided. Must be one of the listed options.

p_adj_method.description: Default: none. Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: pearson. Must be one of the listed options.

colormap.description: Default: coolwarm. Must be one of the listed options.

p_adj_method.description: Default: none. Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: Levene's test. Must be one of the listed options.

plot_type.description: Default: scatter. Must be one of the listed options.

cmap.description: Default: viridis. Must be one of the listed options.

palette.description: Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.

kind.description: Default: scatter. Must be one of the listed options.

marginal.description: Default: hist. Must be one of the listed options.

palette.description: Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.
Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.

fit_type.description: Default: Linear. Must be one of the listed options.

palette.description: Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.
Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.

pairwise_loc.description: Default: upper right. Must be one of the listed options.

palette.description: Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.

dot_palette.description: Default: None. Must be one of the listed options.

error_measure.description: Default: se. Must be one of the listed options.

error_type.description: Default: SEM. Must be one of the listed options.

palette.description: Default: Set2. Must be one of the listed options.

operation.description: Default: sum. Must be one of the listed options.

axis.description: Default: Vertical (stack rows). Must be one of the listed options.

keep.description: Default: first. Must be one of the listed options.

mode.description: Default: Drop rows. Must be one of the listed options.

how.description: Default: inner. Must be one of the listed options.

method.description: Default: Min-Max (0–1). Must be one of the listed options.

script_code.description:
Default: # Write your code here
out_1 = in_1

mode.description: Default: Wide → Long. Must be one of the listed options.

order.description: Default: Ascending. Must be one of the listed options.

operation.description: Default: Strip whitespace. Must be one of the listed options.

order.description: Default: Top (largest). Must be one of the listed options.

operation.description: Default: left / right. Must be one of the listed options.

dtype.description: Default: float. Must be one of the listed options.

edges.description: Connections as [source_id, target_id] pairs. Ports auto-resolved by type.

BatchAccumulatorNode.description: Collects the output of each batch iteration and merges them after the batch finishes.

BatchGateNode.description: Pass-through gate that pauses the batch pipeline for user review.

CollectNode.description: Pack multiple data items into a named collection.

CollectionInfoNode.description: Outputs a table listing item names, types, shapes, and metadata.

DataFigureCellNode.description: Displays incoming Image or Figure data directly on the node surface.

DataTableCellNode.description: Displays incoming DataFrame data directly on the node surface.

DisplayNode.description: Takes any input and pops up a preview window to inspect it.

FileReadNode.description: Reads a tabular file (CSV, TSV) using pandas and outputs a DataFrame.

FilterCollectionNode.description: Keep or remove items by pattern matching on names.

FolderIteratorNode.description: Selects a folder and file pattern for batch processing.

ImageCellNode.description: Displays a PIL Image directly on the node surface for quick inline inspection.

ImageReadNode.description: Reads an image file and outputs it as a float32 [0,1] numpy array.

MapNamesNode.description: Batch rename collection items using find/replace, prefix, or suffix.

PathModifierNode.description: Takes a file path and modifies it by adding a suffix, changing the extension, or overriding the folder.

PopCollectionNode.description: Extract one item from a collection and output the rest separately.

RenameCollectionNode.description: Rename items in a collection using a visual mapping table.

SaveCollectionNode.description: Saves all items in a collection to disk.

SaveNode.description: Saves incoming data to a file on disk.

SelectCollectionNode.description: Extract a single item from a collection by name.

SplitCollectionNode.description: Split a collection into two groups by selecting which items go to each output.

UniversalDataNode.description: Executes arbitrary Python code to process multiple inputs and push results to outputs.

VideoIteratorNode.description: Browses and iterates over frames of a video file.

BandpassFilterNode.description: Applies an FFT-based bandpass filter to a grayscale image.

BinaryThresholdNode.description: Applies interactive global thresholding using a histogram with a draggable threshold line.

thresh_state.description: [threshold, direction] — 1=keep pixels > threshold (strictly above), 0=keep pixels <= threshold (below or equal)

auto_otsu_per_image.description: set to false when using an explicit thresh_state value; default true overrides manual threshold

BitDepthConvertNode.description: Changes the bit depth metadata of an image.

BlackTopHatNode.description: Applies a morphological black top-hat filter to extract small dark features.

BlobDetectNode.description: Detects bright blobs using Laplacian-of-Gaussian (LoG) filtering.

BrightnessContrastNode.description: Adjusts brightness and contrast interactively using a histogram with draggable Min/Max lines.

CannyEdgeNode.description: Detects edges using the Canny algorithm, producing a thin binary edge mask.

ChannelColorizeNode.description: Remaps RGB channels to custom colors and composites them.

ColocalizationNode.description: Computes colocalization metrics between two channels.

ColorDeconvolutionNode.description: Separates staining colours in histology images using colour deconvolution.

CropNode.description: Crops an image or mask to a rectangle drawn directly on the node.

DilationNode.description: Applies binary dilation to expand foreground regions of a mask.

DistanceRingMaskNode.description: Creates an annular (ring) mask by expanding foreground objects outward by a specified distance.

DrawShapeNode.description: Draw shapes, text, and annotations on an image.

EqualizeAdapthistNode.description: Applies CLAHE (Contrast Limited Adaptive Histogram Equalization) to enhance local contrast.

ErosionNode.description: Applies binary erosion to shrink foreground regions of a mask.

FillHolesNode.description: Fills all enclosed background holes in a binary mask regardless of size.

FindContoursNode.description: Finds all contours in a binary mask or edge image at a given intensity level.

FrangiNode.description: Enhances tubular structures using the Frangi multi-scale vesselness filter.

GLCMTextureNode.description: Computes Haralick texture features from a Grey-Level Co-occurrence Matrix (GLCM).

GammaContrastNode.description: Applies gamma correction to adjust image tonality non-linearly.

GaussianBlurNode.description: Applies a Gaussian blur to smooth the image.

HoughCirclesNode.description: Detects circles in a Canny edge image using the Hough circle transform.

HoughEllipseNode.description: Detects ellipses in a Canny edge image using the Hough ellipse transform.

HoughLinesNode.description: Detects straight lines in a Canny edge image using the Hough line transform.

ImageHistogramNode.description: Plots the pixel intensity histogram of an image.

ImageMathNode.description: Performs pixel-wise arithmetic and logical operations on one or two images or masks.

ImageStatsNode.description: Measures whole-mask region properties and pixel intensity statistics in a single table row.

IntensityProfileNode.description: Plots pixel intensity along an interactively drawn line segment.

InteractiveParticleSelectNode.description: Selects particles visually by clicking them directly in the label image.

KeepMaxIntensityRegionNode.description: Keeps the top N connected components ranked by total intensity in the reference image.

LabelEditorNode.description: Interactively edits a multi-label image by drawing shapes and applying operations.

LabelOverlayNode.description: Overlay a label image on top of a base image with automatic coloring.

LaplacianEdgeNode.description: Highlights regions of rapid intensity change using the Laplacian of Gaussian (LoG) filter.

MaskCropNode.description: Crops an image to a mask's bounding box.

MaskEditorNode.description: Interactively edits a mask by drawing shapes and applying boolean operations.

MaskOverlayNode.description: Draw a mask contour (or fill) on an image.

MedialAxisNode.description: Computes the medial axis (distance-based skeleton) of a binary mask.

MergeImageNode.description: Additively blend multiple images into one output.

MergeRGBNode.description: Merges three single-channel grayscale images into a single RGB image.

MirrorNode.description: Flips or mirrors an image or mask along one or both axes.

MorphCloseNode.description: Applies binary closing (dilation then erosion) to a mask.

MorphOpenNode.description: Applies binary opening (erosion then dilation) to a mask.

MultiChannelBCNode.description: Per-channel brightness & contrast with live composite preview.

MultiOtsuNode.description: Splits image intensity into N classes using multi-Otsu thresholding.

OIRReaderNode.description: Read Olympus OIR microscopy files and output each channel separately.

ParticleClassifyNode.description: Assigns particles to named groups by drawing shapes around them.

ParticlePropsNode.description: Labels connected components in a mask and measures each region.

ParticleSelectNode.description: Filters particles from a LabelData input using dynamic filter rules.

PrewittEdgeNode.description: Computes edge strength using the Prewitt gradient-magnitude filter.

RGBToGrayNode.description: Converts an RGB or RGBA image to a single-channel grayscale image.

ROIMaskNode.description: Draws an ROI (ellipse, rectangle, polygon, or lasso) directly on the node surface and outputs a binary mask plus a cropped image.

RemoveSmallHolesNode.description: Fills small enclosed holes in a binary mask up to a given area threshold.

RemoveSmallObjectsNode.description: Removes small connected components from a binary mask.

ResizeNode.description: Resizes an image or mask to an exact pixel size (width x height).

RollingBallNode.description: Subtracts slowly-varying background illumination using rolling-ball estimation.

RotateNode.description: Rotates an image counter-clockwise by a given angle in degrees.

SaveImageNode.description: Saves an image to disk. Click Browse to choose file location and format.

ScaleBarNode.description: Draws a calibrated scale bar on a microscopy image.

SetScaleNode.description: Manually set the pixel scale (µm/pixel) for an image.

SkeletonAnalysisNode.description: Analyses a skeleton produced by SkeletonizeNode.

SobelEdgeNode.description: Computes edge strength using the Sobel gradient-magnitude filter.

SplitRGBNode.description: Splits an RGB image into its individual Red, Green, and Blue channels.

ThresholdLocalNode.description: Applies adaptive local thresholding to produce a binary mask.

WatershedNode.description: Separates touching or overlapping objects using marker-controlled watershed segmentation.

WhiteTopHatNode.description: Applies a morphological white top-hat filter to extract small bright features.

ZoomNode.description: Resizes an image by a zoom factor using high-quality Lanczos resampling.

ContingencyAnalysisNode.description: Tests categorical association using chi-square and Fisher's exact tests.

DataSummaryNode.description: Computes pixel intensity histograms for images or descriptive statistics for DataFrames.

GroupedComparisonNode.description: Tests whether there are significant differences among two or more groups.

LinearRegressionNode.description: Performs ordinary least-squares (OLS) linear or polynomial regression.

ModelPredictNode.description: Predicts Y values from a fitted model and a new data table.

NonlinearRegressionNode.description: Fits nonlinear curves to XY data using `scipy.optimize.curve_fit`.

NormalityTestNode.description: Tests whether each numerical column in a DataFrame follows a normal distribution.

OutlierDetectionNode.description: Detects and removes outliers in numerical data using statistical tests.

PCANode.description: Performs principal component analysis (PCA) for multivariate data exploration.

PairwiseComparisonNode.description: Performs pairwise comparisons between groups using parametric or non-parametric tests.

PairwiseMatrixNode.description: Computes a pairwise correlation or distance matrix for all numeric columns and visualises it as a heatmap.

SurvivalAnalysisNode.description: Performs Kaplan-Meier survival analysis with log-rank test.

TwoWayANOVANode.description: Performs two-way analysis of variance with interaction term (Type II SS).

VarianceTestNode.description: Tests whether two or more groups have equal variance (homoscedasticity).

AnglePlotNode.description: Creates a polar angle distribution plot for angular data.

BarPlotNode.description: Creates a bar plot showing group means with error bars and optional significance-bracket overlay.

BoxPlotNode.description: Creates a box-and-whisker plot with optional significance-bracket overlay.

DoubleVarPlotNode.description: Generates a 2D seaborn plot from a data table.

FigureEditNode.description: Interactively edits the aesthetics of any FigureData input via a popup dialog.

HeatmapNode.description: Creates a heatmap with optional hierarchical clustering of rows and/or columns.

HistogramNode.description: Creates a histogram with optional grouping and KDE overlay.

JointPlotNode.description: Creates a joint plot — scatter with marginal distributions on each axis.

KdePlotNode.description: Creates a kernel density estimate plot for smooth distribution visualisation.

RegressionPlotNode.description: Creates a scatter plot with a fitted regression line and optional 95% confidence band.

SaveFigureNode.description: Saves a matplotlib figure to disk. Click Browse to choose file location and format.

ScatterPlotNode.description: Creates a scatter plot (X vs Y) with optional regression line and hue grouping.

SurvivalPlotNode.description: Draws Kaplan-Meier survival curves from SurvivalAnalysisNode output.

SvgEditorNode.description: Converts an upstream matplotlib Figure to SVG for interactive element editing.

SwarmPlotNode.description: Creates a swarm plot with optional statistical annotation overlay.

ViolinPlotNode.description: Creates a violin plot with optional significance-bracket overlay.

VolcanoPlotNode.description: Creates a volcano plot showing log2(fold change) vs -log10(p-value).

XYLinePlotNode.description: Creates an XY line plot with error bars in the classic Prism graph style.

CellEdgeMaskNode.description: Generates a binary cell-body mask from a fluorescence image.

FilopodiaAnalyzeNode.description: Skeletonizes the filopodia mask and measures each branch.

FilopodiaDetectNode.description: Detects filopodia candidates as a binary mask.

AggregateTableNode.description: Reduces a table to aggregate statistics across rows, optionally grouped by column.

BlankSubtractNode.description: Subtract a reference row's value from all rows in a column.

ColumnValueSplitNode.description: Splits a table into two outputs based on whether a column's value matches a list of specified values.

ConcatTablesNode.description: Concatenates two tables by stacking rows (vertical) or columns (horizontal).

DropDuplicatesNode.description: Removes duplicate rows from a table.

DropFillNaNNode.description: Removes or fills NaN values in a table.

DropRowsNode.description: Drop rows where a column matches any of the specified values.

EditableTableNode.description: Displays an input table in an editable spreadsheet widget and outputs the modified result.

ExtractObjectNode.description: Extracts a single object (image, figure, label, etc.) from a table's object column.

FilterTableNode.description: Filters rows in a TableData object using a pandas query string.

GroupNormalizationNode.description: Normalizes numerical columns relative to a specified control group mean.

JoinTablesNode.description: Merges two tables on a shared key column (like SQL JOIN).

MathColumnNode.description: Creates or modifies a column using a pandas eval expression.

NormalizeColumnNode.description: Normalizes one or more numeric columns.

PythonScriptNode.description: Run custom Python code with dynamic input and output ports.

script_code.default:
# Write your code here
out_1 = in_1

RandomSampleNode.description: Randomly samples N rows from the input table.

RenameGroupNode.description: Renames values in a target column based on a mapping string or the built-in mapping table.

ReshapeTableNode.description: Converts a table between wide and long format.

RowNormalizeNode.description: Normalize all rows by a reference row's value (divide instead of subtract).

SaveTableNode.description: Saves a table to disk. Click Browse to choose file location and format.

SelectColumnsNode.description: Keeps only the columns listed in 'Columns' and drops everything else.

SortTableNode.description: Sorts a table by one or more columns in ascending or descending order.

StringColumnOpsNode.description: Applies a string operation to a text column.

TopNNode.description: Extracts the top (or bottom) N rows ranked by a numeric column.

TwoTableMathNode.description: Computes a scalar arithmetic operation between one value from each of two input tables.

TypeCastColumnNode.description: Converts the data type of one or more columns.

ValueCountsNode.description: Counts occurrences of each unique value in a column.
